title: Tito's Lemonade
description: Crisp, refreshing vodka lemonade made with fresh-squeezed lemons and Tito's Handmade Vodka. Clean, simple, and incredibly drinkable.

ingredients.note: dissolved in a small splash of warm water

ingredients.item: lemon wheel, fresh mint, and ice

steps.instruction: Dissolve honey in a small splash of warm water, stir until fully liquid.
Squeeze lemon juice into the glass, discarding seeds.
Add Tito's Vodka and honey water. Stir well to combine.
Top with cold water (for a still version) or club soda (for a sparkling version). Stir gently.
Garnish with a lemon wheel and fresh mint. Serve immediately.

notes: Using fresh lemon juice instead of pre-made lemonade makes all the difference — it's brighter and less sweet. Club soda adds a great effervescent finish.
